title: hakea obliqua subsp. obliqua
intro: Hakea obliqua subsp. obliqua, also known as the oblique hakea, is a species of shrub or small tree that is native to the eastern coast of Australia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Hakea obliqua subsp. obliqua include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and aid in the management of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. In herbal preparations, Hakea obliqua subsp. obliqua is often made into a tea or infusion, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
